articles.title: I hate that I don’t hate this song made with Suno
articles.description: I would never go so far as to say there's no place for AI in music (I'm a fan of Holly Herndon, after all). But I generally find music made with generative AI to be offensively boring, especially the outputs of Suno. So I'm having a bit of a tough time processing the fact that […]

articles.title: Breaking down matchups for Argentina-Spain World Cup final — plus a prediction - New York Post
articles.description: [nypost.com] As for fan makeup, expectation is it will be a largely Argentine crowd. La Albiceleste’s fanbase has traveled better than just about any other all tournament. That said, the final tends to be a largely corporate atmosphere, and that’s likely the case this time too, given exorbitant ticket prices. Prediction Spain 2-1, on penalties. Rodri controls the ball for Spain during its July 14 match against France. DeFodi Images/Shutterstock Pau Cubarsí (lef), pictured on July 14, has been a key piece for Spain throughout the World Cup. Their knockout run has demanded enormous physical and emotional effort, including dramatic victories over Switzerland and England after another comeback. article.title: Dave Eggers told OpenAI staff that ChatGPT was ‘silencing an entire generation’
article.description: Last year, Sam Altman invited author Dave Eggers to give a talk to around 200 OpenAI staffers. The man has written countless novels, screenplays, pieces of journalism, started McSweeney's, and founded multiple schools and nonprofits that support writers and the arts more broadly. So one might expect he'd roll into the company's offices and offer […]

prefilter_candidates.title: Meet Yang Zhilin, the CEO and founder behind China's buzzy new Kimi K3 AI model - Business Insider

article.title: Meet Yang Zhilin, the CEO and founder behind China's buzzy new Kimi K3 AI model - Business Insider
article.description: [www.businessinsider.com] Kimi K3 has now catapulted both Moonshot AI and its founder onto the global stage. Vercel CEO Guillermo Rauch said Kimi K3 marked "the first time that an open model is ahead of all proprietary ones for this comprehensive web engineering benchmark," in a post on X. While Wharton professor Ethan Mollick called it "closest to the frontier yet." "The ultimate AGI company will dwarf today's giants — double, triple the scale. Not necessarily OpenAI, but such a company will exist," Yang said in his interview with Zhang. Why Yan Zhilin left the US [...] Kimi K3 is the latest buzzy open-weight model fr [www.businessinsider.com] Moonshot says K3 still trails the most powerful proprietary models, Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 and OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol, overall, but beats the labs' second-tier systems, Claude Opus 4.8 and GPT-5.5, on benchmarks including coding and agentic tasks. Within a day, K3 topped Arena's frontend coding leaderboard, ahead of every leading US model, and placed third on Artificial Analysis's Intelligence Index. The release, timed just ahead of the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference in Shanghai, is the latest sign that Chinese labs are closing the gap with leading US systems. It also rattled [www.bbc.com] Its arrival later this month will make it the world's first open-source model in the three-trillion-parameter class that can be freely downloaded, run and customised by outside developers. The release comes at a highly sensitive moment for the global technology sector, just weeks after the US government abruptly forced American developer Anthropic to temporarily withdraw its flagship Fable and Mythos models due to severe cybersecurity concerns. While Washington has since lifted those restrictions, the initial move highlights ho

items.title: Claude Code’s creator offers a better way to measure AI success than token burn - Business Insider Africa
items.summary: Claude Code 创作者提出四步框架，主张以员工采纳后的实际回报衡量企业 AI 成功。
items.why_it_matters: 该框架为企业评估 AI 投入产出提供新标准，影响技术落地与成本核算。

items.title: I hate that I don’t hate this song made with Suno
items.summary: 作者承认对 Suno 生成的音乐不再反感，尽管此前认为生成式 AI 音乐枯燥乏味。
items.why_it_matters: 反映公众对 AI 创作接受度变化，可能推动音乐领域工具采用与内容生态发展。
